name: The Ironworks
description: A river-and-rail industrial belt of foundries, tank farms, and warehouses. Materials, fuel, and tools for the taking — and the hazards that come with all three.
notes: Crafting/economy backbone (feeds M4 T51/T52): metal stock, fuel, chemistry, a workshop. Environmental hazards; power/water infrastructure. Rail links to the harbor, canal to the hill.
